item.description: Officials from the U.S. and Iran appear to be nearing a deal to end the ongoing Middle-East conflict, according to public statements from President Donald Trump Saturday. “An Agreement has been largely negotiated, subject to finalization between the United States of America, the Islamic Republic of Iran, and the various other Countries, as listed,” Trump wrote in a Truth Social post Saturday afternoon. NBC News' Raf Sanchez reports.

media:content.media:title: Trump says agreement on Iran war ‘largely negotiated’
media:content.media:description: Officials from the U.S. and Iran appear to be nearing a deal to end the ongoing Middle-East conflict, according to public statements from President Donald Trump Saturday. “An Agreement has been largely negotiated, subject to finalization between the United States of America, the Islamic Republic of Iran, and the various other Countries, as listed,” Trump wrote in a Truth Social post Saturday afternoon. NBC News' Raf Sanchez reports.

item.title: Trump says agreement on Iran war ‘largely negotiated’

item.description: Gov. Gavin Newsom (D-CA) declared a state of emergency in California on Saturday as thousands of people were forced to evacuate their homes over a toxic chemical tank that, authorities say, will either leak or explode. NBC News' Steve Patterson is on the ground just outside the evacuation zone.

media:content.media:title: State of emergency declared over southern California chemical incident
media:content.media:description: Gov. Gavin Newsom (D-CA) declared a state of emergency in California on Saturday as thousands of people were forced to evacuate their homes over a toxic chemical tank that, authorities say, will either leak or explode. NBC News' Steve Patterson is on the ground just outside the evacuation zone.

item.title: State of emergency declared over southern California chemical incident

item.description: The Secret Service shot and killed an armed suspect who opened fire at a security checkpoint outside the White House. The 21-year-old suspect was known to police and Secret Service with a history of mental health concerns, according to multiple senior law enforcement officials. A second person, who authorities believe to be a bystander, was injured in the shooting and that person’s condition is unclear. NBC’s Julie Tsirkin reports for Sunday TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Secret Service Takes Down Gunman Near White House
media:content.media:description: The Secret Service shot and killed an armed suspect who opened fire at a security checkpoint outside the White House. The 21-year-old suspect was known to police and Secret Service with a history of mental health concerns, according to multiple senior law enforcement officials. A second person, who authorities believe to be a bystander, was injured in the shooting and that person’s condition is unclear. NBC’s Julie Tsirkin reports for Sunday TODAY.

item.title: Secret Service Takes Down Gunman Near White House

item.description: Rep. Thomas Massie (R-Ky.) tells Meet the Press he “won't rule anything out” as he’s asked about his political future after losing his primary to a Trump-backed challenger.

media:content.media:title: Massie says he’ll ‘stay engaged’ after primary loss, won’t rule out 2028 run
media:content.media:description: Rep. Thomas Massie (R-Ky.) tells Meet the Press he “won't rule anything out” as he’s asked about his political future after losing his primary to a Trump-backed challenger.

item.title: Massie says he’ll ‘stay engaged’ after primary loss, won’t rule out 2028 run

item.dc:creator: Freddie Clayton
item.description: Regional concern over the Ebola outbreak intensified as Uganda confirmed three new cases, while neighboring countries stepped up monitoring measures amid fears of cross-border spread.

media:content.media:text: Uganda stepped up measures along the DKC border to combat the Ebola outbreak
media:content.media:description: Ugandan health teams screen travelers entering the country for Ebola as precautions has been stepped up at the Mpondwe Border Crossing on the border with the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) on May 23.

media:content.media:text: Uganda stepped up measures along the DKC border to combat the Ebola outbreak
media:content.media:description: Health teams at the Mpondwe crossing on the border with Congo on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: DRCONGO-HEALTH-VIRUS-EBOLA
media:content.media:description: Health workers wearing protective equipment disinfect the isolation area for Ebola patients Saturday at the General Referral Hospital of Mongbwalu, Congo.

item.title: DR Congo’s neighbors impose Covid-style measures in push to limit Ebola’s spread

item.dc:creator: Jared Perlo
item.description: Pope Leo XIV is set to release a landmark encyclical Monday focused on preserving human dignity in the face of AI

media:content.media:text: Two hands reach out, in the style of "The Creation of Adam," against a blue sky. A glowing green computer chip hovers between the fingers.

item.title: Pope Leo will take on AI alongside an Anthropic co-founder

item.dc:creator: Harry Rabinowitz
item.description: Shop the best Memorial Day deals on mattresses, home appliances, beauty, tech and more from brands like Brooklinen, Ninja, Levoit, EltaMD and Apple.

media:content.media:credit: Amazon; Kara Birnbaum / NBC News; Brooklinen
media:content.media:text: It may not be Black Friday, but Memorial Day weekend is one of the best times to shop before summer hits.
media:content.media:description: It may not be Black Friday, but Memorial Day weekend is one of the best times to shop before summer hits.

media:content.media:text: It may not be Black Friday, but Memorial Day weekend is one of the best times to shop before summer hits.
media:content.media:description: It may not be Black Friday, but Memorial Day weekend is one of the best times to shop before summer hits.

item.title: The 93+ absolute best Memorial Day sales worth shopping

item.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

media:content.media:title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
media:content.media:description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

item.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio

item.dc:creator: Nollaig O'Connor
Doha Madani
item.description: A woman paragliding over the Austrian Alps survived a horrifying midair collision after a small plane flew through her glider, sending her spiraling out of control thousands of feet in the air

media:content.media:text: Drone shot, view of village with parish church, Piesendorf, Pinzgau, Salzburg province, Austria, Europe
media:content.media:description: A view of Piesendorf, Pinzgau, Salzburg province, Austria.

item.title: ‘Can’t believe I’m sitting here’: Paraglider escapes death after plane rips through glider

item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
item.description: Venezuela’s Nobel Peace Prize laureate María Corina Machado announced Saturday that she plans to run for president again and intends to return to her home country before the end of 2026

media:content.media:text: Maria Corina Machado
media:content.media:description: Venezuelan politician Maria Corina Machado.

item.title: María Corina Machado vows another run for Venezuelan presidency and eyes return from exile

item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
item.description: Authorities in northern China were investigating a coal mine operator with a focus on safety lapses, as rescuers searched for those missing in the country’s deadliest coal mine explosion in recent years that killed at least 82 people

media:content.media:text: Rescue workers walk outside near an ambulance at the site of a coal mine explosion
media:content.media:description: Rescue workers at the Liushenyu coal mine in Qinyuan County, China, on Saturday after an explosion occurred.

item.title: Authorities investigate safety lapses after China coal mine blast kills at least 82

item.dc:creator: Mirna Alsharif
Bella LoBue
item.description: At least 19 people were injured in a stampede at an annual motorcycle rally Sunday morning in Atlantic Beach, according to local officials.

media:content.media:text: A firetruck parked outside at night
media:content.media:description: Horry County Fire Rescue crews were dispatched to the stage area near South Ocean Boulevard in Atlantic Beach for a reported stampede incident in Atlantic Beach, S.C., on May 24, 2026.

item.title: At least 19 injured in a South Carolina stampede

item.dc:creator: Tavleen Tarrant
Larissa Gao
item.description: Of the hundreds of “LabGerm” videos posted and reposted to social media in recent weeks, most start out the same way: A pair of gloved hands appears against a white backdrop as an AI-generated voice narrates and upbeat music plays in the background

media:content.media:text: Illustration of a common pleco fish on phone screens.
media:content.media:description: Hundreds of "LabGerm" videos on Douyin show small animals being physically maimed.

media:content.media:text: A screenshot of a TikTok video showing two Pleco fish inside of a small water container, with a caption that reads "Removing the plecos heart brain liver and lungs one by one"
media:content.media:description: Hundreds of "LabGerm" videos on Douyin show small animals being physically maimed.

media:content.media:text: two gloved hands hold on to the fins of two different colored pleco fish, one black, left, and one orange
media:content.media:description: Hundreds of "LabGerm" videos on Douyin show small animals being physically maimed.

item.title: How bizarre fish ‘experiment’ videos from China hijacked the internet’s worst impulses

item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
item.description: Cristian Mungiu’s Norway-set drama about political polarization, “Fjord,” has won the Palme d’Or, handing the Cannes Film Festival ’s top honor for the second time to Mungiu, the Romanian director of “4 Months, 3 Weeks and 2 Days.”At a 79th Cannes Film Festival that saw few films cause a stir, “Fjord” found wide admiration for its engrossing tale of what Mungiu called “left-wing fundamentalism.”

media:content.media:text: From left, Tilda Swinton, Renate Reinsve, Cristian Mungiu, and Sebastian Stan pose together for a photo as Cristian holds the Palme d'Or prize trophy
media:content.media:description: From left, Tilda Swinton, Renate Reinsve, Cristian Mungiu, winner of Palme d'Or for "Fjord," and Sebastian Stan during the closing ceremony of the 79th annual Cannes Film Festival on Saturday.

item.title: Norway-set drama about political polarization ‘Fjord’ wins Palme d’Or at Cannes

item.dc:creator: Doha Madani
Cristian Santana
item.description: Five Chicago police officers were hit by a car early Sunday while on duty on the city’s west side, the department said.

media:content.media:text: chicago police patch logo

item.title: 5 Chicago police officers struck by a car while dispersing a crowd

item.dc:creator: Megan Lebowitz
item.description: Rep. Thomas Massie, R-Ky., warned on “Meet the Press” that the Republican Party will be “very vulnerable” during the midterm elections.

media:content.media:text: Thomas Massie seated on the set of Meet the Press
media:content.media:description: Rep. Thomas Massie, R-Ky., on NBC News' "Meet the Press" on May 24, 2026.

item.title: Rep. Thomas Massie warns GOP will be ‘very vulnerable’ in the midterms

item.dc:creator: Freddie Clayton
item.description: Regional concern over the Ebola outbreak intensified as Uganda confirmed three new cases, while neighboring countries stepped up monitoring measures amid fears of cross-border spread.

media:content.media:text: Uganda stepped up measures along the DKC border to combat the Ebola outbreak
media:content.media:description: Ugandan health teams screen travelers entering the country for Ebola as precautions has been stepped up at the Mpondwe Border Crossing on the border with the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) on May 23.

media:content.media:text: Uganda stepped up measures along the DKC border to combat the Ebola outbreak
media:content.media:description: Health teams at the Mpondwe crossing on the border with Congo on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: DRCONGO-HEALTH-VIRUS-EBOLA

item.title: DR Congo’s neighbors impose Covid-style measures in push to limit Ebola’s spread

item.description: Pope Leo XIV is set to release a landmark encyclical Monday focused on preserving human dignity in the face of AI

media:content.media:text: Two hands reach out, in the style of "The Creation of Adam," against a blue sky. A glowing green computer chip hovers between the fingers.

item.title: Pope Leo will take on AI alongside an Anthropic co-founder

item.dc:creator: Alexandra Marquez
item.description: The now-viral, AI-generated video opens with the iconic Hollywood sign on fire and features Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass wearing makeup to look like the Joker.

media:content.media:text: Spencer Pratt, Los Angeles mayor Karen Bass and Nithya Raman.
media:content.media:description: Spencer Pratt, Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass and Nithya Raman.

item.title: Reality check: Spencer Pratt seeks to convert online attention to real-life votes in L.A.

item.dc:creator: Kyla Guilfoil
item.description: The shooting at the White House on Saturday evening is just the latest act of political violence carried out in President Donald Trump’s orbit in recent weeks

media:content.media:text: Three secret service agents wearing black uniforms on the White House lawn at dusk.
media:content.media:description: Secret Service agents stand outside the White House on Saturday night after the nearby shooting.

item.title: White House shooting is latest incident in a string of political violence

item.dc:creator: Steve Patterson
Dennis Romero
item.description: Firefighters were trying to cool a chemical tank “literally on the edge” of exploding in Garden Grove, California, as they worked to avert a disastrous “worst-case” scenario, the incident’s commander said.

media:content.media:text: An aerial photo of three large industrial tanks with water being sprayed and misted onto them.
media:content.media:description: An aerial view of water being sprayed onto an overheated 34,000-gallon tank at GKN Aerospace in Garden Grove, Calif. on May 23, 2026.

media:content.media:text: A firefighter in a red truck leans out of the driver's window and points.
media:content.media:description: An Orange County firefighter instructs a photographer to evacuate from the area in Garden Grove, Calif., on Friday.

media:content.media:text: A drone photo of a suburban development at the edge of an industrial lot.
media:content.media:description: Evacuation orders were issued for roughly 40,000 residents in Garden Grove, as well as neighboring cities near GKN Aerospace, lower right, on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: A woman seated in the driver's seat of a gray sedan speaks to two police officers standing outside the car.
media:content.media:description: Garden Grove police officers direct an evacuee toward a shelter Friday.

media:content.media:text: A large american flag hanging on the wall of a makeshift shelter in a large white hangar.
media:content.media:description: An emergency evacuation center in Fountain Valley on Saturday for residents near the area of the chemical leak.

item.title: Chemical tank ‘on the edge’ of exploding in California as crews try to avert disaster

item.dc:creator: Doha Madani
Cristian Santana
item.description: Five Chicago police officers were hit by a car early Sunday while on duty on the city’s west side, the department said.

media:content.media:text: chicago police patch logo

item.title: 5 Chicago police officers struck by a car while dispersing a crowd

item.description: At least 19 people were injured in a stampede at an annual motorcycle rally Sunday morning in Atlantic Beach, according to local officials.

media:content.media:text: A firetruck parked outside at night
media:content.media:description: Horry County Fire Rescue crews were dispatched to the stage area near South Ocean Boulevard in Atlantic Beach for a reported stampede incident in Atlantic Beach, S.C., on May 24, 2026.

item.title: At least 19 injured in a South Carolina stampede

item.description: Dr. Andre Cheng and his identical twin Sandre both work at New York’s Long Island Jewish Hospital in Forest Hills fulfilling their dream – and their mother’s dream – as doctors. Their bond comes with a built-in second opinion and a connection that helps in stressful times. NBC’s Hallie Jackson reports in this week’s Sunday Spotlight.

media:content.media:title: These Twin Brothers Work as Doctors at the Same Hospital
media:content.media:description: Dr. Andre Cheng and his identical twin Sandre both work at New York’s Long Island Jewish Hospital in Forest Hills fulfilling their dream – and their mother’s dream – as doctors. Their bond comes with a built-in second opinion and a connection that helps in stressful times. NBC’s Hallie Jackson reports in this week’s Sunday Spotlight.

item.title: These Twin Brothers Work as Doctors at the Same Hospital

item.dc:creator: Mirna Alsharif
Meriam Bouarrouj
item.description: An Illinois school shooting plot was foiled Friday after a relative spotted a boy with a firearm and called 911, according to the Will County Sheriff’s Office

media:content.media:text: Grand Prairie Elementary School.
media:content.media:description: Grand Prairie Elementary School.

item.title: Illinois school shooting plot foiled by relative who tackled the armed child, officials say
